Projects

Contacts
Unified contact management across WhatsApp, Telegram, and more
Models & API Keys
Keys saved to ~/.crewswarm/config.json
⚡
RT Bus Auth Token
Auto-generated during install and saved to ~/.crewswarm/config.json. All services read it from there — you never need to copy it manually. Only change this if you want to rotate the secret or run the RT bus on a shared machine.
not set

Add Custom Provider

Search & Research Tools

Assign models, edit system prompts, configure per-agent tool permissions. crew-lead is managed separately in Services tab.

Edit system prompts for each agent. Changes take effect after restarting the agent's bridge. - agents configured

Loading…
🔐 Command Allowlist
Patterns here auto-approve agent @@RUN_CMD calls — no toast, no wait. Dangerous commands (rm -rf, sudo, curl|bash) are always blocked.
Quick presets
Active patterns
⚙️ Environment Variables
Configure runtime env vars — saved to ~/.crewswarm/crewswarm.json and applied immediately. Restart services for changes to take effect in spawned processes.
🌐 Inbound Webhooks
External services can push events to the RT bus via:
POST http://127.0.0.1:5010/webhook/{channel}
Any JSON payload is accepted and published to webhook.{channel} on the RT bus and broadcasts to the dashboard.
Test webhook
Recent events
—
📡 Telegram
Bot config, sessions, and RT feed
● stopped
⚙️ Bot Configuration
Each Telegram chat gets its own isolated session in crew-lead.
Add contact names below so the crew can message by name (e.g. TELEGRAM at-Jeff hello).
Get a token from @BotFather.
🎤 Text-to-Speech (TTS)
🎭 Per-Agent Voices
Agents reply with voice messages instead of text. Google TTS is FREE (4M chars/month). Configure API keys in Models tab.
Conversations
Each chat ID gets an isolated session with crew-lead
RT Bus Activity
Read-only — watch agents work in real time
💬 WhatsApp
Personal bot via Baileys — your phone as a linked device
● stopped
⚙️ Configuration
Leave empty to accept messages from anyone.
Fallback agent for numbers without custom routing (below).
Auth persists in ~/.crewswarm/whatsapp-auth/ — QR scan is only needed once.
Start the bridge from the terminal to scan the QR code the first time:
npm run whatsapp
📋 Auth status
Checking...
Recent messages
Inbound and outbound WhatsApp messages
📂 Project Directory
All coding engines (OpenCode, Cursor, Claude Code, Codex) will use this as the working directory. Set it to your project folder to avoid permission errors. Leave blank to use the crewswarm repo directory (default).
🧠 Crew Lead Default Model
Default model for crew-lead LLM router. Used when no agent-specific model is set.
🔒 Config Protection
Lock crewswarm.json to prevent accidental overwrites (recommended after bulk updates)
checking...
⚡ Default OpenCode Model
Primary model used when routing agents through OpenCode. Per-agent OpenCode models (set in Agents tab) override this default.
⚡ OpenCode Fallback Model
When the primary model hits rate limits, OpenCode retries with this model. Use a different provider (e.g. groq) to avoid the same limit.
🌐 Global Fallback Model
Applied to any agent that has no per-agent fallback set. Prevents jobs dying on rate limits or hangs.
🧠 Background Consciousness
When idle, crew-lead reflects on system state, surfaces blockers, and dispatches follow-ups automatically. Runs every 15 min when no pipelines are active.
🔁 Engine Loop (Ouroboros)
Multi-step agentic loop — the agent's LLM decomposes a task into STEP instructions, each executed by the active engine (OpenCode, Cursor, Claude Code, or Codex), until it replies DONE. Works with any engine, not just OpenCode.
📣 Passthrough Notifications
When a direct engine passthrough (Claude Code, Cursor CLI, OpenCode, Codex) completes, where should the reply be sent? TG only recommended if you don't want every CLI reply flooding WhatsApp.
⚡ Cursor Parallel Waves
Route pipeline waves through Cursor's native subagent system. All agents in a wave run simultaneously in isolated context windows via the crew-orchestrator subagent — no queuing, no collisions. Requires Cursor CLI installed (~/.local/bin/agent). Single-task waves always bypass the orchestrator.
🕸 Autonomous Mention Routing
Global hard switch for shared-channel autonomy. When enabled, @crew-* and @codex, @cursor, @claude, and @opencode , @gemini, and @crew-cli can auto-run. Turn it off to keep mentions informational only.
🤖 Claude Code Executor
Route tasks through Claude Code CLI (claude -p) instead of direct LLM. Full workspace context, native tool use, session continuity per agent. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and Claude Code installed. Per-agent override: useClaudeCode: true in crewswarm.json.
🟣 Codex CLI Executor
Route tasks through Codex CLI (codex exec --json) instead of direct LLM. Runs in your workspace directory with full file access. Per-agent override: useCodex: true in crewswarm.json. Requires Codex CLI installed: npm i -g @openai/codex.
🔵 Gemini CLI Executor
Route tasks through Gemini CLI (gemini -p) instead of direct LLM. Free tier: 60 req/min · 1,000 req/day via Google OAuth — no API key needed. Per-agent override: useGeminiCli: true in crewswarm.json. Install: npm install -g @google/gemini-cli then run gemini auth login.
🔧 Crew CLI Executor
Route tasks through crewswarm's native CLI instead of direct LLM. Intelligent routing to 20+ specialist agents, sandbox workflow, cross-repo context, and persistent memory via AgentKeeper. Per-agent override: useCrewCLI: true in crewswarm.json. Built-in — no installation needed.
⚡ OpenCode Executor
Route tasks through OpenCode CLI (opencode run) for full IDE capabilities. Session-based workflow with persistent context, best for complex coding tasks. Per-agent override: opencodeLoop: true in crewswarm.json. Requires OpenCode CLI installed.
Engines
Execution engines agents can run through. Install, manage, and import custom engines.
Import engine from URL
Paste a raw URL to an engine JSON descriptor. GitHub blob URLs are auto-converted to raw.
Format: { "id", "label", "bin", "installCmd", "traits", ... }
Skills
API skill definitions agents can call with @@SKILL
🔌 Skills
Skills let agents call external APIs with @@SKILL skillname {params}. Store skill definitions in ~/.crewswarm/skills/.
Import Skill from URL
Paste a raw URL to a SKILL.md or .json skill file. GitHub blob URLs are auto-converted to raw.
New Skill
🔔 Pending Skill Approvals
No pending approvals.
Run skills
Installed skills from the health snapshot. Enter params and run on demand (same API agents use with @@SKILL).
Planning Pipeline Waves
Configure the 3-wave planning pipeline that runs when you say "build me X". Swap agents (e.g., crew-copywriter → crew-researcher), edit tasks, add/remove agents per wave.
Workflow Cron
Create multi-step agent workflows (wave-like), use job templates, then schedule with cron presets or custom expressions.
Saved Workflows
Run Log

Shared Memory

            

              Unified memory across CLI, Gateway, Cursor, and all agents —
              AgentKeeper (task memory) + AgentMemory (cognitive facts) +
              Collections (RAG)

Build

              

                Select a project, describe what to build, and kick off the crew
              

            

          


          
          

            

              
              
              + New project
              
            

            

          


          
          

            
Requirement

            
            

              
              
              
              
              
              
            

            

            

              ▶ Run Build — one phased build (MVP→Ph1→Ph2), runs in
              background. 🔁 Build Until Done — loops continuously until
              roadmap exhausted. PM Loop ▶ — reads ROADMAP.md and
              dispatches each item one at a time.
            

          


          

            

              
PM Loop

              idle
            

            

              ← Select a project above
            

            

              Reads the selected project's ROADMAP.md, dispatches one task at a
              time, self-extends when the roadmap empties.
